channel.title: 2026-05-02 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-02 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Unsupervised Electrofacies Classification and Porosity Characterization in the Offshore Keta Basin Using Wireline Logs
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hamdiya Adams, Theophilus Ansah-Narh, Daniel Kwadwo Asiedu, Bruce Kofi Banoeng-Yakubo, Marcellin Atemkeng, Thomas Armah, Richmond Opoku-Sarkodie, Rebecca Davis, Ezekiel Nii Noye Nortey
arXiv:2604.27126v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This study presents an unsupervised machine learning workflow for electrofacies analysis in the offshore Keta Basin, Ghana, where core data are scarce. Six standard wireline logs from Well~C were analysed over a depth interval comprising approximately 11,195 samples. K-means clustering was applied in multivariate log space, with the clustering structure evaluated using inertia and silhouette diagnostics. Four clusters were identified, supported by an average silhouette coefficient of approximately 0.50, indicating moderate but meaningful separation. The resulting electrofacies exhibit systematic, depth-continuous patterns associated with variations in clay content, porosity, and rock framework properties, forming a geological continuum from…

item.title: 磁导航下具有催化活性的多路复用模块化纳米机器人系统
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Voichita Mihali, Xinan Huang, Lucie Motyckova, Nicolas Moreno Gomez, Michal Skowicki, Cora‐Ann Schoenenberger, Peer Fischer, Cornelia G. Palivan
该工作围绕模块化纳米机器人系统的设计与功能化展开，构建了可在磁导航控制下执行催化反应的多路复用纳米机器人平台。研究发表于Wiley旗下Advanced Functional Materials，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 碳平面π电子网络断裂构建电子局域化NiN4位点实现高效电化学CO2还原
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Jiaqi Xiang, Xinyu Li, Yifan Jiang, Can Zhang, Yuhan Yan, Lang Qin, Maoyu Wang, Josue Pizano, Ke Zeng, Limiao Chen, Shaowei Chen, Shanyong Chen, You‐Nian Liu
该工作围绕碳基材料中π电子网络的调控策略展开，通过打破碳平面内的π电子共轭体系，构建具有电子局域化特征的NiN4活性位点，以提升电化学CO2还原反应的效率。研究发表于Wiley旗下Advanced Functional Materials，详情需查阅原文。
